tasks.label: Run Dev PS
args: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-Command','Set-Location ''${workspaceFolder}/tourneyClient''; npm run dev'; Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}'; dotnet run --project tourneyAPI --launch-profile http-dummy-users

tasks.label: Run Dev Bash
args: cd '${workspaceFolder}/tourneyClient' && npm run dev & cd '${workspaceFolder}' && dotnet run --project tourneyAPI --launch-profile http-dummy-users
